title: Ubiquiti UVC-G5-Turret-Ultra, UniFi Video Camera G5 Turret Ultra, black
category: Ubiquiti / Cameras, security / IP cameras / Turret
description: UVC-G5-Turret-Ultra is a 5th-generation camera from the UniFi Video series. It features a 1/2.4" CMOS sensor with a resolution of 4MP (2688 x 1512 px, 16:9) @ 30 FPS . The fixed lens offers a viewing angle of 102.4° horizontally , 54.9° vertically, and 120.6° diagonally. The camera is equipped with a microphone (can be disabled) and a (1) 10/100Mbps Ethernet port, powered via PoE 802.3af or passive PoE with an input voltage of 37 - 57 V DC .
